title: turraea mombassana subsp. cuneata
intro: Turraea mombassana subsp. cuneata, also known as the Cuneate Turraea, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Turraea mombassana subsp. cuneata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
